title: Salon booking marketing site
prompt: Build a polished website for a neighborhood salon. I want a hero, stylist cards, service pricing, customer testimonials, and a clear book-appointment call to action.

title: Customer follow-up tracker
prompt: Create a small customer follow-up tracker where I can add leads, edit the next follow-up date, update status, and keep a visible saved list of who still needs outreach.

title: Incident operations dashboard
prompt: Create a React incident operations dashboard with severity KPI cards, region filters, a recent incidents panel, and a clear escalation summary.

title: Helpdesk desktop shell
prompt: Create a desktop helpdesk workspace with a sidebar, ticket queue, priority filters, and a clear new-ticket action.

title: Subscription management API
prompt: Build a small API service for subscription management with endpoints to list subscriptions, create one, pause one, and resume one.

title: JSON audit CLI
prompt: Create a command-line tool that reads a JSON file and prints a compact audit summary with key counts, nested object depth, and obvious missing fields.

title: Input validation helpers
prompt: Create a small reusable TypeScript validation library with email checks, required-string guards, min-length validation, and friendly error formatting helpers.
